    <Data>Sigma rule match found: Rare GrantedAccess Flags on LSASS Access (see Details tab for more information)</Data>
    <Data>Module: Sigma</Data>
    <Data>Rule_Title: Rare GrantedAccess Flags on LSASS Access</Data>
    <Data>Rule_Author: Florian Roth</Data>
    <Data>Rule_Description: Detects process access to LSASS memory with suspicious access flags 0x410 and 0x01410 (spin-off of similar rule)</Data>
    <Data>Rule_FalsePositives: Legitimate software accessing LSASS process for legitimate reason</Data>
    <Data>Rule_Id: 678dfc63-fefb-47a5-a04c-26bcf8cc9f65</Data>
    <Data>Rule_Level: medium</Data>
